title: Learn Ava chat architecture for team handoff
description: Explored 5 systems: chat, tabs, bg processes, client-server, rendering. Created 7 docs in projects/ava-chat-system-architecture/ for team handoff.
close_reason: done

comments.author: Automaker
comments.text:
Completed: Explored 5 architectural systems via parallel agents + direct code analysis. Created 8 markdown files documenting:
- Chat system (session pool, Zustand + AI SDK, SSE streaming)
- Tab systems (6 independent implementations)
- Background processes (FeatureStateMachine, worktree isolation, crash recovery)
- Client-server contract (BaseHttpClient, EventBus, 200+ typed events)
- Component rendering (TanStack Router, 11 Zustand stores, lazy loading)

Defined 30 sections across 5 domains for platform team handoff at projects/ava-chat-system-architecture/

title: Init br (beads) in a repo via the UI Beads view
description: The Beads view should let a user initialize beads in a repo that doesn't yet have a .beads/ store — i.e. run the equivalent of 'br init' / create .beads/beads.db + issues.jsonl from the UI, rather than requiring the CLI. Surface an 'Initialize beads' affordance in the beads view when no store is detected for the current project. Server-side goes through BeadsService (apps/server/src/services/beads-service.ts), routes under /api/beads/*. Acceptance: opening the Beads view in a repo with no .beads/ offers an init action; after init, the view shows an empty tracker and subsequent create/list work.
close_reason: Shipped via #3927: UI Beads view detects uninitialized projects and offers Initialize beads (br init) through /api/beads/status + /init

title: Standardize .beads/ gitignore — allowlist form
description:
Already ignores .br_history/ and daemon.log. metadata.json is committed (upstream treats it as workspace-local) — optionally `git rm --cached .beads/metadata.json`. Adopt the allowlist .gitignore to future-proof against new br runtime files.

Standard (matches protoPen PR #73 + upstream pattern in steveyegge/beads#919): replace .beads/.gitignore with the allowlist form:

    *
    !issues.jsonl
    !config.yaml
    !routes.jsonl
    !.gitignore

Committed = shared source of truth (issues.jsonl, config.yaml, routes.jsonl). Ignored = local/runtime (beads.db*, *.lock, .br_history/, daemon.*, metadata.json, .local_version, last-touched, *.tmp). Robust: new volatile files br adds are ignored automatically, no .gitignore churn. Verify with git check-ignore after.

title: Verifier: require verification evidence at EXECUTE exit
description: EXECUTE cannot transition to REVIEW without a verification artifact (tests/lint/typecheck ran+passed, tied to the diff). Persist evidence to the trajectory. Configurable per workflow. GH #3906.
close_reason: Verifier-evidence gate at EXECUTE exit + getWorkflowSettings propagation fix; PR opened. eval 9/9.
